creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Looking at the last few lines of the patch from submitter, 
the lines like: 

-%%PORTEXAMPLES%%@dirrm %%EXAMPLESDIR%% 
+@dirrm %%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%% 

break this port's respect to NOPORTEXAMPLES. 

Please fix this, thanks!
